name: xdm_media_workflow_overhaul_overlay
description: Adds a grouped media detection inbox, stream quality and language planning, bounded live recording, FFmpeg capability diagnostics, and richer HLS/DASH workflow UI.
commitMessage: Overhaul media detection and stream workflow
constraints: Require zero warnings and zero errors
Preserve request metadata for detected media
Enforce live capture duration and byte limits during transfer
Preserve existing conversion presets and FFmpeg finalization
Fix the existing BuildAria2Headers CA1859 warning
